title: Suki Gifts International - Small Sitting Dog, Shih Tzu (12179), White
features: Suki Gifts Classics Dog - Shih Tzu (12179)
Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all.
Part of the Suki Gifts Classic Collection
description: Product Description Realistic mini version of a Shih Tzu dog featuring delicate air-brushed shading and posed in a sitting position - Part of Suki's classic dog, cat and animal collection Directions 1. Remove the toy from its packaging. 2. Hand wash the toy with warm, soapy water. 3. Air dry the toy. 4. Store the toy properly when not in use.
